items.title: The Rush to Return to the Office Is Stalling
items.description: The Rush to Return to the Office Is Stalling

items.title: Trump’s $100,000 H-1B Visa Fee Sets Off Scramble Across Corporate America
items.description: Companies have urgently ordered workers back to the U.S. before Sunday. The White House is seeking to calm the situation, noting the fee doesn’t apply to current visa holders.

items.title: Is Having a Position in the Entire Stock Market a Better Option Than Investing in the S&P 500?
items.description: The S&P 500 continues to hit new records, and tracking it may no longer be the safest option for risk-averse investors.

items.title: Companies rush to issue emergency guidance after Trump launches H-1B visa fee
items.description: Companies are rushing to ensure thousands of employees around the globe do not trigger hefty new immigration fees after Washington announced sweeping changes to the H-1B foreign worker visa.
